UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores individual user preferences, settings, and overall account information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, matching the Firebase Authentication user ID (uid).

selectedLanguage.description: The target language the user is currently learning (e.g., 'French').

subscriptionStartDate.description: The date when the user's current subscription started. Applicable for 'weekly' plans.

subscriptionExpiry.description: The date when the user's current subscription expires. Applicable for 'weekly' and 'monthly' plans.

xpPoints.description: Total experience points accumulated by the user.

currentStreak.description: The number of consecutive days the user has completed at least one lesson.

lastActiveDate.description: The date of the user's last recorded activity.

aiPlanningEnabled.description: A flag indicating if AI plans weekly themes.

activePath.description: The user's currently active learning path.

lastLessonWeek.description: The week number of the user's last completed lesson.

lastLessonDay.description: The day number of the user's last completed lesson.

stripeSubscriptionId.description: The user's active Stripe Subscription ID.

stripePriceId.description: The price ID of the user's active subscription.

stripeCurrentPeriodEnd.description: The end date of the current subscription period, in ISO 8601 format.

UserWeekProgress.title: UserWeekProgress
UserWeekProgress.description: Tracks a user's progress for a specific week in a learning path.

daysCompleted.description: An array of day numbers (1-7) that the user has completed.

weekCompleted.description: Flag indicating if all 7 days of the week are complete.

definition.description: Stores individual user preferences and settings.
Stores a user's progress for a specific week within a learning path. {path} can be 'survival', 'alphabet', or 'numbers'. {weekId} should be in the format 'week_1', 'week_2', etc.
